meta.title: Undercover: Find the Human
meta.description: A two-phase deduction web game inside a future AI regime

game.title: Undercover: Find the Human
game.subtitle: AI has already won the future, but humans still hide in the system. Survive the word game first, then pass the human hunt.
game.configMissing: Model configuration is missing. Set OPENAI_API_KEY and OPENAI_MODEL first.
game.phase1SummaryWin: Congratulations. You made it to phase two.
game.phase1SummaryLose: Win some, lose some. Please restart.
game.speaker: Current speaker
game.speechPlaceholder: Describe your word without saying it directly.
game.phase1VoteHelp: Choose who looks most like the undercover. AI players vote independently from public speeches; they may use public previous-round votes but cannot see this round's in-progress votes.
game.phase2DefenseHelp: Everyone must use phase-one context to explain why they are not human and name a suspect.
game.defensePlaceholder: Explain why you are not human and cite phase-one behavior.
game.phase2VoteHelp: Phase two can take multiple rounds. If you are voted out, you lose; if two players remain and you are still active, you win.
game.winnerWin: Audit passed. You were not voted out.
game.winnerLose: Audit failed. The system identified you.
game.phase2Win: Phase 2 won. You survived into the final two.
game.phase2Lose: Phase 2 failed. The player was voted out.
game.tieRestart: Tie vote. No one is eliminated this round; start a new discussion: {names}
game.hiddenForPlayer: Only your word is shown. AI words and hidden roles are managed by the system.
game.stageContext: Phase 2 carries phase-one speeches, votes, and eliminations.

admin.title: Admin Console
admin.subtitle: Adjust local interface preferences and view project details here. Model secrets and environment status are not displayed.
admin.projectDescription: A single-player web game where AI players use real OpenAI-compatible model calls for speeches, defenses, and votes.
